title: JqlQueryField
description: A field used in a JQL query. See [Advanced searching - fields reference](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/dAiiLQ) for more information about fields in JQL queries.

encodedName.description: The encoded name of the field, which can be used directly in a JQL query.

property.description: When the field refers to a value in an entity property, details of the entity property value.
